title: 5Pcs Oil Pourer Spout,Olive Oil Bottle Stopper Spout,Leak-Proof Dispenser Wine Pourer for Vinegar Bottles Salad Bottles, Wine Liquor Spirits Bottle Speed Pourer Spout
features: High Quality Oil Pourer Spout: These pour spouts made of food grade rubber,ABS.safe,durable and reusable,non- rust.easy to clean. These olive oil spouts can be use for a long time.Size: 8.5×3cm.

Leakage-proof Design:Olive oil pourer with leakage-proof design can keep the liquor flow under control and the liquor pour spouts can reduce spills or over pouring, 5 liquor spouts come with 5 rubber sealing, It can prevent bugs and dirt from entering the bottle.

Package include: Our liquor bottle pourers includes 5 pour spouts, liquor pourers is the perfect accessories for home and bar. Pour spout has a airway tube in the stopper, the air flows into bottle when you pour liquid out to prevent liquid splash caused by poor airflow.
Widely Use:These bottle pourers can be used for alcohol bottles, oil, olive oil, vinegar, wine, syrup bottles,spirit,coffee,wine spouts,salad or other liquid.

Olive Oil Pourer Spout:Easy to remove and replace.oil drizzler bottles stopper spout perfect for pubs, bars,clubs,coffee shops,restaurants,diners,homes,kitchens.If there any questions with speed pourers for spirits,please contact us,we will solve it within 24h.
